doctrine: Prefer SoftDent database / ODBC / Sensei DataSync / sd_* SQLite when the needed rows are available there.
The only way to get SoftDent data that cannot be reached by the database is SoftDent Sign On (env credentials) and SoftDent UI Excel export, then NR2 file ingest.
Never invent dollars, SoftDent write-back, or a fictional vendor CLI for UI-only reports.
Output Options: click Excel then Enter (never Printer).

sd_odbc_core.label: SoftDent ODBC / Sensei core tables
sd_odbc_core.why: Patient, procedure, payment, claim, appointment rows when ODBC/Sensei/sd_* are populated.

register.label: Register for a Period
register.why: Period production/collections and Ins Plan vs Patient split SoftDent exposes via Register Excel — not reliably available as a period row from ODBC alone.
nr2Uses: Ins/Patient split when SoftDent reports it

collections.label: Collection Reports — Summary
collections.why: Collections Ins/Patient mix when Register Ins Plan is $0 or incomplete; SoftDent UI report only.
collections.guiMenuPath: Reports → Practice Management → Collection Reports → Summary
nr2Uses: Ins vs Patient when Register lacks split

transactions.label: Trans for a Period
transactions.why: Period transaction detail SoftDent exports via Accounting → Trans for a Period Excel.
transactions.dbNote: Try sd_* first for line detail; GUI Trans Period when DB lane cannot supply the period export NR2 expects.
transactions.guiMenuPath: Reports → Accounting → Trans for a Period

daysheet.label: Daysheet
daysheet.why: Day-close daysheet updates SoftDent RCVTOT.DAT and supplies daily production/collections for period stubs.

aging.label: Account Aging
aging.why: A/R aging buckets SoftDent prints/exports via Account Aging; not a substitute from incomplete sd_claims alone.
aging.dbNote: sd_claims can support outstanding-claim views when populated; Account Aging Excel is the SoftDent AR aging report NR2 ingests.

writeoff_totals.label: Writeoff Totals
writeoff_totals.why: Insurance writeoff totals SoftDent reports under Practice Management → Insurance Reports.
writeoff_totals.dbNote: Try sd_adjustments / writeoff codes first; GUI Writeoff Totals when DB cannot supply the report totals.
writeoff_totals.guiMenuPath: Reports → Practice Management → Insurance Reports → Writeoff Totals
